items.name: moq-dev/moq
items.description: Reference MoQ implementation including moq-relay, moq-clock, and broadcasting tools.

items.name: cloudflare/moq-rs
items.description: Rust implementation of the IETF MoQ Transport protocol, maintained at Cloudflare.

items.name: facebookexperimental/moxygen
items.description: Meta's C++ implementation of the IETF MoQ protocol.

items.name: mengelbart/moqtransport
items.description: Go implementation of the MoQ Transport protocol.

items.name: moqtail/moqtail
items.description: Draft-16 compliant MOQT publisher, subscriber, and relay libraries.

items.name: meetecho/imquic
items.description: QUIC library with RTP over QUIC (RoQ) and Media over QUIC (MoQT) support.

items.name: facebookexperimental/moq-go-server
items.description: Experimental Meta relay optimized for low-latency media transfer, implementing IETF MoQ.

items.name: rafaelcaricio/gst-moq-pub
items.description: GStreamer plugin that implements a MoQ publisher element.

items.name: englishm/libmoq
items.description: MoQ library with a C FFI for integration with FFmpeg and other native tools.

items.name: Eyevinn/warp-player
items.description: Player for CMAF media over MoQ Transport using MSE playback.
